title: Socio-Economic Analysis of Effectiveness of Implementation of an Employment Guarantee Scheme at Local Level: A Study of a Village in India

summary.about: How India’s rural employment-guarantee program functions at the village level.
summary.audience: Local and national social-protection agencies and rural administrators.
summary.method: Combines a participant survey in Sanatpur with official statistics and descriptive analysis.
summary.insights: Low awareness and limited financial access weaken implementation; nearly 70% of surveyed rural residents lacked individual bank accounts.
